title: Rui Rui he Ta de Pengyoumen: Xinchun Teji

alternative_titles.en: Real and His Friends: Spring Festival Special
alternative_titles.ja: 瑞瑞和他的朋友们·新春特辑

synopsis:
This Spring Festival Special tells, in the form of stop-motion animation, about how Real and his friends celebrate the Spring Festival: They make glutinous-rice New Year cake; set off firecrackers; give red-enveloped lucky money as gift; play lion dancing and dragon dancing; and enjoy the countdown together with the beloved. That’s how the Chinese New Year should be celebrated. It awakens our fondest memories about the Spring Festival.

(Source: Real Wood YouTube Channel)
